description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this pair of pyjama set from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsPink top with a V-neckline with embroidered lace at the neckline, thin and adjustable shoulder straps, smocking at the back, bow detail on the shoulder straps and above the hemPink pyjama with a flat front and an elasticated waistbandMaterial and CareShell: 100% polyesterLace: 42% nylon, 50% rayon and 8% cottonHand wash, drip dry in shadeDo not wring, iron, bleachWash dark colours separately
